description: Pipeline-level error tests asserted only result.error.kind, never result.error.path. A regression where mapStatDirResult or mapSettingsSaveError were called with the wrong path argument would not be detected at the pipeline boundary. Unit-level helper tests did assert path correctness, mitigating the risk. Resolved in-place by adding error.path assertions to every path-not-found / permission-denied test in pipeline.test.ts.

resolution.notes: Added error.path assertions to all pipeline-level error tests across REQ-002..REQ-007 describes.
